title: SLA Management + Workflow Engine — Passive DNS Escalation Integration
description: sla_management.py provides business-hours SLA policies with compliance framework overrides and team leaderboard. test_workflow_engine.py confirms the workflow CRUD is solid. test_passive_dns_engine.py reveals passive DNS tracking exists. However SLA breaches do not trigger workflow escalation steps automatically, and passive DNS domain-threat detections have no SLA assignment.
missing: SLA breach → workflow escalation: when a ticket breaches SLA, auto-create an escalation workflow step that notifies team_lead then director then CISO
Passive DNS → SLA ticket: when passive_dns_engine detects a new malicious resolution, auto-create an SLA-tracked finding with severity-appropriate deadline
Business-hours calculator accuracy: implement public holiday calendar per org timezone so SLA deadlines correctly skip holidays and weekends
